p.c: function[T0: CommRing](x0: Point2[T0], x1: Point2[T0]) { (x0 - x1).norm_sq = x0.dist_sq(x1) }[T](c, b)

goal: v.norm_sq + u.norm_sq - v.dot(u) - v.dot(u) = u.norm_sq + v.norm_sq - u.dot(v) - u.dot(v)

p.c: function[T0, T1, T2](x0: (T0, T1) -> T2, x1: T1, x2: T0) { lib(functions).flip[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x2, x1) }[T, T, T](T.sub, u.dot(v), u.norm_sq + v.norm_sq - u.dot(v))
